title: Thediyae Thediyae Lyrics - Va Quarter Cutting Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer : Andrea Jeremiah
Song  : Thediyae Thediyae
Movie: Va Quarter Cutting
Lyrics : Kumararaja, Shiva

[
[Thediyae Thediyae kangal oikindradhe
Ambuli pola nam vetkai theikindradhe
Algebra algorithym polave irunda en vaanil
Minnal minnum nerathai] (2)

Thediyae Thediyae kangal oikindradhe
Ambuli pola nam vetkai theikindradhe
Algebra algorithym polave irunda en vaanil
Minnal minnum nerathai

Engo en life-um odum-mmm
Seashawvil aadum-mmm pillai pole
Melvandhum kele pogum-mm
Vandhum varamal pogum-mmm
Erellam thummal pole thedum
En luck-um ematriya pogum] (2)

[
[Thedinen Thedinen kannil therikindradhe
Ambuli pola nam vetkai vazharkindradhe
Paatiyin kambali polave aganda en vazhvil
Vinmeengal kankottum]   (2)

Oh...
Engum sandhosam pongum
oonjalil pillai polaadidum
Pinvandhum munne pogum
Kannal kandale podhum
Kottavi pole ottikollum
En aanadham thotri kollum] (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Thediyae Thediyae conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in Va Quarter Cutting, highlighting moments of fun and camaraderie among friends.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah and composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

Thediyae Thediyae was released on September 3, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thediyae Thediyae, the upbeat rhythm and playful lyrics encapsulate the carefree moments of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The song showcases the vibrant energy of friendship and joy, resonating with anyone looking to have a good time. Set against the backdrop of Va Quarter Cutting, it enhances the film's lighthearted narrative. Andrea Jeremiah's captivating vocals combined with GV PrakashKumar's lively composition create an infectious vibe that uplifts the spirit.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thediyae Thediyae from Va Quarter Cutting is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the enchanting voice of Andrea Jeremiah. With GV PrakashKumar's catchy music and Kumararaja's clever lyrics, this song captures the essence of youthful exuberance. It's the perfect track to elevate any party atmosphere and keep spirits high!
stanzaMeanings: The eyes are searching for something, like a light that guides us. Our dreams are like a spark in the sky, shining brightly in the right moment.
The eyes are searching for something, like a light that guides us. Our dreams are like a spark in the sky, shining brightly in the right moment.
My life is moving like a wave, dancing like a child. Things come and go without notice, like everything is just a game. My luck is also changing.
I have found what I was looking for, like a light in my eyes. Our dreams are living like a spark, shining brightly in my life, like stars in the sky.
Oh... Happiness spreads everywhere, like a child playing on a swing. Things come and go in front of me, and when I see them, they seem to be just a game. My joy will also be fulfilled.
